'''Salen Toth''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] around the time of the [[New Sith Wars]]. Salen was sent to the planet [[Harpori]] in the [[Balowa system/Legends|Balowa system]] to investigate the mysterious disappearance of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Crian Maru]] and her apprentice, [[Dree Vandap]]. Using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] as a guide, Salen was drawn to a lake in the middle of the forests of Harpori.<ref name="Darkness Shared" />

There, Salen found the slain body of Crian's apprentice, [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] strike. On the shore of the lake, Salen could find no sign of Dree's master; however, he did note that a darkness permeated the area. Figuring that there was nothing more he could learn of the events that took place, Salen gathered up Dree's lifeless body and returned to his ship, his investigation completed.<ref name="Darkness Shared" />
